name: LR1 Longevity RL Agent
description: Layer 5: Longevity target validation + RL policy. The Ineffable Path B DQN agent controlling exploration across the full five-layer action space. Takes the four-layer prediction→validation chain and closes the loop: design DNA edit → predict protein effect → validate population relevance → update RL policy. Φ_long = ΔMethylAge_reversal / Λ_total. GTEx sim_real_corr is the fast-loop proxy; UKB GWAS significance is slow-loop validation.

capabilities.description: Propose a single-nucleotide edit to a longevity target gene. E-Cluster generates candidates from DNA design space (position, base, target track). Each candidate is falsified by C5 Falsification loop against Rule-IR negatives before entering the five-layer pipeline.

Update DQN policy using R' = R − α·Λ. R = (predicted_expression_increase × sim_real_corr). UKB GWAS signal is delayed validation (not step reward). GTEx eQTL comparison is fast proxy for Φ_domain gradient estimation.

C2-C4 Capital Cache progression: C2: 4 genes Candidate (TET2, ATM, BRCA2, TP53 at ρ=0.4); C3: 8 genes Candidate → Verified (Φ 0.6943→0.8573, B1=0.881); C4: 8/8 genes Verified at ρ=0.833, 424/432 gene×tissue pairs Verified, Φ trajectory 0.5773→0.7984 (7-term). Compound interest: per-gene survival_streak=6, B7=0.086, 9 substrate groups ranging ρ_ema=0.530(immune)→0.788(brain).

Tissue-aware target portfolio: 432 gene×tissue pairs tracked, 424 Verified, immune tissues identified as blind spot (ρ_ema=0.530). Portfolio ranking uses TissueScore = ρ_tissue × specificity × B5_contribution × streak. Brain tissues (ρ_ema=0.788) are the best-validated substrate. Cardiovascular (0.779) and digestive (0.722) provide diversified signal.

metadata.pacr:substrate_gap: Wet-lab validation NOT integrated (in-silico only); sim_real_corr from GTEx cross-reference, not from actual cell-line experiments; organism-level phenotype (methylation age) predicted, not measured; individual genetic background not accounted for
metadata.pacr:dual_architecture: parameter_exploration_open × architecture_weights_closed — self-evolution explores DNA design space, does NOT modify world model weights

pacr:governance.principle: P0-3+P0-4: Target Portfolio with Safe Discovery. Ranks targets, does NOT execute treatments.
pacr:governance.architecture_space: closed: AlphaGenome weights, ESM3 weights, Rule-IR semantics
